risks: A copied final bundle template can be misread as live evidence if ignored nested placeholders survive hash recomputation.
The real independent reviewer assignment and remaining final-bundle artifacts are still missing; owner/coordinator must supply real evidence before closure review can proceed.
rollback: Revert recursive placeholder scanner, focused regression test, phase record, manifest, traceability row, delivery task, event records, generated views, and three base records; no runtime production state was changed.
next_step: Supply real final-bundle artifacts, starting with FINAL_ACCEPTANCE_BUNDLE/independent_final_reviewer_assignment.json, then validate each artifact before any independent final closure decision or final acceptance claim.
